items.title: Joint Reconstruction of Multiple b ‐Values and Multiple Directions for Accelerating Diffusion Kurtosis Imaging
items.description: ABSTRACT Purpose While multishot interleaved echo‐planar imaging (iEPI) enables higher resolution diffusion kurtosis imaging (DKI) compared to single‐shot EPI, its clinical application is hindered by the lengthy acquisition time.
